methodology: Static code and route-structure review targeting viewports ≤768px. No automated screenshots in CI; issues are inferred from layout classes, tap-target sizes, and navigation patterns. Re-run after major header/learner shell changes.

issues.screenshotHint: On iPhone, logo row sits under status bar; guest Login/Sign up use min-h 36px.
issues.recommendedFix: Apply env(safe-area-inset-top) padding to the mobile header row; raise guest CTA min height to ~44px on small screens.

issues.screenshotHint: Accordion mega-menus are deep; primary actions also appear at bottom of drawer.
issues.recommendedFix: Keep single drawer pattern; ensure route changes close drawer (already on pathname effect); maintain large footer CTAs in drawer.

issues.screenshotHint: Five-column grid: long pathway pill labels can crowd adjacent nav labels on narrow phones.
issues.recommendedFix: Truncate pathway pill with title tooltip; keep min-h-11 on bottom links.

issues.screenshotHint: Row height h-9 with py-1 pills — vertical tap area under ~44px.
issues.recommendedFix: Increase row min-height on mobile so context pills meet comfortable touch targets.

issues.screenshotHint: Close control uses compact padding; section labels at 10px.
issues.recommendedFix: Enlarge close button hit area; bump section label minimum text size slightly on mobile.

issues.screenshotHint: Card-heavy grids may feel tight at 320px depending on page-specific classes.
issues.recommendedFix: Prefer nn-section-shell / consistent px-4 sm:px-6; avoid edge-to-edge prose without horizontal padding.

issues.screenshotHint: Long markdown sections; scroll-mt on section cards for in-page anchors.
issues.recommendedFix: Maintain scroll-margin for sticky mini-nav patterns; ensure figures use max-width 100% (PathwayLessonFigures).

issues.screenshotHint: Answer rows and bottom actions must stay thumb-reachable; session UI varies by surface.
issues.recommendedFix: Use min-h ~44px for primary answer rows where not already; reserve space for sticky footers.

issues.screenshotHint: Flip/tap areas and card bounds on small widths.
issues.recommendedFix: Ensure card containers use w-full max-w-full; adequate padding inside flip surfaces.

issues.screenshotHint: Keyboard can obscure footer actions on small devices if layouts are too tall.
issues.recommendedFix: Keep form stacks with comfortable input min-height and error region visibility; avoid fixed footers that overlap inputs.

issues.screenshotHint: Wide tables may require horizontal scroll — verify overflow-x-auto wrappers.
issues.recommendedFix: Wrap tables in overflow-x-auto with min-w-0 parents; stack filters vertically on mobile where present.

issues.screenshotHint: globals.css sets overflow-x hidden — good baseline; stray wide children can still clip.
issues.recommendedFix: Audit offenders with devtools; prefer max-w-full on media and pre/code blocks.
